label: Transparent fennel motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a complete fennel frond and yellow umbel seed head motif, isolated full botanical subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: airy fennel frond with fine threadlike anise-green leaves, pale green stems, small yellow umbel flowers/seed clusters, subtle sand-dusted coastal-field character, accurate botanical form, natural culinary herb texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop leaves, stems, or umbel.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural anise green, yellow umbel, and sand-tan botanical detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no bowl, no plate, no hand, no bouquet wrapper, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board named "Morphous Fennel", derived from the previously generated fennel motif: fine anise-green fennel fronds, pale stems, yellow umbel flowers, and coastal sand neutrals.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the fennel motif image. The board must visibly respect only motif-derived colors: anise greens, fennel stem green, yellow umbel, dune sand, dry straw, warm off-white, deep olive ink, and soft coastal shadow.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 landscape board, target 3840x2160, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, clear token chips, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections with readable headings: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-style buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search bar, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metrics, chart, empty/loading/error/success states.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography examples with short labels such as 見出し, 本文, 入力, 状態; multilingual product UI guidance.
Style/medium: premium product design system board, precise grid, quiet culinary dashboard mood, refined coastal-field texture, 8px radii, crisp cards and controls, restrained shadows, no nested cards.
Color constraints: use only fennel motif colors and near-neutrals from the motif; no unrelated bright colors, no purple/blue gradients, no stock UI kit colors.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels only, no random brand names, no watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the "Morphous Fennel" design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the previously generated fennel motif and the light Morphous Fennel board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, 8px radius language, culinary dashboard components, texture, spacing, and typography.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 landscape board, target 3840x2160, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section headings and short readable UI labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections with readable headings: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Visual details: dark background derived from the motif's deepest olive and anise ink colors, light text from shell-white and sand highlights, yellow umbel accents, fennel green controls, subtle frond texture overlays, crisp shadcn/tweakcn cards, restrained shadows, 8px radii.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, badges, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, alerts, cards, data table, command palette, search bar, sidebar, top nav, dashboard metrics, charts, empty/loading/error/success states.
Japanese typography: include short examples such as 見出し, 本文, 入力, 状態 with Noto Sans JP guidance.
Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors: deep olive, anise green, fennel leaf, stem green, yellow umbel, pollen yellow, dune sand, dry straw, shell white, coastal mist. No neon colors, no unrelated red, no unrelated blue, no purple gradients, no pure black background.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels only, no random brand names, no watermark.
